name: Okta User Reported Suspicious Activity (30 days)
description: Detects user-reported suspicious activity events in Okta, aligned with public Okta detections.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS account_name, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'user.account.report_suspicious_activity_by_enduser' AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Treat end-user suspicious activity reports as potential account compromise and triage sign-in/session activity immediately.
